extract: If you were looking for the Ability with the Japanese name Iron Thorns, see Iron Barbs (Ability). If you were looking for the throwing item in the Pokémon Mystery Dungeon series, see Iron Thorn. Iron Thorns (Japanese: テツノイバラ Tetsunoibara) is a dual-type Rock/Electric Paradox Pokémon introduced in Generation IX. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Iron Thorns is said to be either a future relative of Tyranitar or a version of it from a parallel timeline.
